verses.2: For, behold, your enemies are stirred up.
verses.3: They conspire with cunning against your people.
verses.4: “Come,” they say, “let’s destroy them as a nation,
verses.5: For they have conspired together with one mind.
verses.6: The tents of Edom and the Ishmaelites;
verses.8: Assyria also is joined with them.
verses.9: Do to them as you did to Midian,
verses.11: Make their nobles like Oreb and Zeeb,
verses.12: who said, “Let’s take possession of God’s pasture lands.”
verses.13: My God, make them like tumbleweed,
verses.14: As the fire that burns the forest,
verses.15: so pursue them with your tempest,
verses.17: Let them be disappointed and dismayed forever.
verses.18: that they may know that you alone, whose name is the LORD,
